tosLink.title: tos_link
tosLink.description: Link to the Terms of Service. Can be a relative or absolute URL.

privacyPolicyLink.title: privacy_policy_link
privacyPolicyLink.description: Link to the Privacy Policy. Can be a relative or absolute URL.

helpLink.title: help_link
helpLink.description: Link to a help page. Can be a relative or absolute URL.

resourceOwnerType.title: resource_owner_type
resourceOwnerType.description:
ResourceOwnerType returns if the setting is managed on the organization explicitly or
 fell back on the instance settings.

docsLink.title: docs_link
docsLink.description: Link to documentation to be shown in the management console.

customLink.title: custom_link
customLink.description: Link to an external resource that will be available to users in the management console.

customLinkText.title: custom_link_text
customLinkText.description: The button text that would be shown in the management console pointing to custom link.
